content: Tommaso ha la Bibbia in nove lingue: spagnolo, esperanto, francese, greco, ungherese, inglese, latino, portoghese e russo.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by carlosalberto (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:Thomas has the Bible in nine languages﹕ Spanish, Esperanto, French, Greek, Hungarian, English, Latin, Portuguese and Rus
